text: Oak Hollow rests in a wooded dip where charcoal smoke and turned earth scent the air. Families keep old stories close and measure strangers by patience, not rank.

actions.chapel bell: A cracked chapel bell hangs silent while villagers debate how to fund its repair before the next holy day.
actions.charcoal pit: Burners tend the mound carefully; one spark too soon ruins a week of labor.
